protocol.candidate_pool: all scored CMM-ADR pairs excluding predictor.known_map positive edges

checkpoint_context.scope_limitations: Checkpoint was explicitly marked as part of the final 10-fold PU-XMSAT export; candidate claims remain bounded by the prediction-score claim boundary.

claim_boundary: PU-XMSAT prediction scores are model-ranked hypotheses for CMM-ADR triage; they are not external clinical validation, confirmed causal effects, or medical recommendations.
